news.t: Columbia Research Enhanced Real Estate ETF to Close and Liquidate
Columbia Threadneedle Investments Launches Columbia Research Enhanced Real Estate ETF (CRED)

holdings.infoBox: CRED is an equity ETF with a total of 68 individual holdings. The top holdings are Prologis stock at 12.19%, Equinix at 10.00%, Simon Property Group at 8.40%, American Tower at 7.93%, and Digital Realty Trust at 6.02%.

overview.description: The Columbia Research Enhanced Real Estate ETF (CRED) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund tracks an index comprised of US REITs. The strategy is based on a multi-factor criteria evaluated by Columbia Threadneedle and Lionstone Investments. CRED was launched on Apr 26, 2023 and is issued by Columbia Threadneedle.
infoTable: Beta Advantage Research Enhanced REIT Index

data.title: Columbia Research Enhanced Real Estate ETF to Close and Liquidate
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Columbia Research Enhanced Real Estate ETF (NYSE Arca: CRED) today announced that it will close, and its respective assets will be liquidated to shareholders, on or about July...
